content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.vtuber_core
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/vtuber_core.py (1445 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos VTuber Core - Main orchestration for AI VTuber streaming

Integrates:
- Avatar rendering with lip sync and expressions
- Real-time TTS with the multi-voice system
- Swarm collective for chat responses
- RTMPS streaming to Twitter/X
- Chat reading and response routing
- Real-time web research 

CLASSES:
- WebResearcher: Real-time web research for the collective
  Methods: async def search_duckduckgo(self, query: str, max_results: int=5) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def search_html(self, query: str) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def search_wikipedia(self, query: str) -> str
  Methods: async def search_news(self, query: str) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def fetch_page_content(self, url: str, max_chars: int=2000) -> str
  Methods: async def research_topic(self, topic: str) -> str
  Methods: async def close(self)
- VTuberState(Enum): Current state of the VTuber system
- VTuberConfig: Complete VTuber configuration
- CosmosVTuber: Main VTuber orchestration class

This is the central hub that coordinates:
1. Av
  Methods: async def start(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: def is_live(self) -> bool
  Methods: def stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def start_vtuber_stream(stream_key: str, simulate: bool=False, debug: bool=False) -> CosmosVTuber
